Petition For Instructions To Determine Remainder Beneficiaries Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-16-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Sheila Robello, Esq., for John Warda, Petitioner.
No other appearances.

At the outset, the court confirms that there are no appearances to object and confirms with counsel that she is not aware of any objections.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
